languages.text: Вы сумели облегчить боль солдата, оперируемого хирургеонами Сектора Бионика.
You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.
languages.original_text: Вы сумели облегчить боль солдата, оперируемого хирургеонами Сектора Бионика.

traits.locale_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.
You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.
You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

languages.text: Aliviaste el dolor de un soldado que estaba siendo intervenido por los cirujanos del Sector Bionica.
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: Aliviaste el dolor de un soldado que estaba siendo intervenido por los cirujanos del Sector Bionica.

languages.text: 你缓解了一名正接受仿生区船医手术士兵的痛苦。
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: 你缓解了一名正接受仿生区船医手术士兵的痛苦。

languages.text: Vous avez apaisé la douleur d'un soldat opéré par des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica.
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez apaisé la douleur d'un soldat opéré par des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarınca ameliyat edilen bir askerin acısını dindirdin.
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarınca ameliyat edilen bir askerin acısını dindirdin.

languages.text: Du hast den Schmerz eines im Sektor Bionica operierten Soldaten gelindert.
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: Du hast den Schmerz eines im Sektor Bionica operierten Soldaten gelindert.

languages.text: セクター・ビオンカの外科医が手術をしている兵士の痛みを和らげました。
languages.original_text: You eased the pain of a soldier being operated on by Sector Bionica chirurgeons.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオンカの外科医が手術をしている兵士の痛みを和らげました。
